name: orca
description: Spawn, fork, message, follow, or orchestrate Claude Code and Codex agent instances in cmux tabs from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Spawn, fork, message, follow, or orchestrate Claude Code and Codex agents in cmux tabs.
interface.longDescription: Orca packages skills for launching fresh AI coding workers, forking existing provider conversations into cmux tabs, messaging existing agent surfaces, following workers to completion, and running multi-step workflows.
defaultPrompt: Spawn a Codex worker for this task
Hand this bug to Claude Code in cmux
Fork this Codex conversation in a new cmux tab
Send a follow-up to the Claude agent in this workspace
Ship this fix end to end as a reviewed draft PR
